ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the data is recorded */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* The quarter of the year for which the data is recorded */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry */,
  "rgdp10" REAL /* Real Gross Domestic Product (RGDP) at a 10-year interval */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the given period */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the given period */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the given period */,
  "external_investment" REAL /* Amount of external investment in the industry */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance for the given period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "quarter", "industry_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the industry was established */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Current market size of the industry */,
  "key_players" TEXT /* List of key players in the industry */,
  "regulatory_environment" TEXT /* Information about the regulatory environment affecting the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the region */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* List of major industries in the region */,
  "regulatory_environment" TEXT /* Information about the regulatory environment in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_region_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the industry operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_region_mapping_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_region_mapping_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the data being accessed */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the economic report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the economic report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "related_industries" TEXT /* List of industries related to the report */,
  "related_regions" TEXT /* List of regions related to the report */,
  "external_contributors" TEXT /* List of external contributors to the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
